hero.subtitle: Software Engineer
hero.name: Ahmed Yousif
hero.description: I build exceptional digital experiences that live at the intersection of design and engineering. Let's create something remarkable.

about.label: About Me
about.p1: With over 5 years of experience as a software engineer, I build across the full spectrum — web applications, mobile apps, and custom business systems — all engineered for performance and built to scale.
about.p2: I thrive in the full stack — from pixel-perfect frontends to scalable backend architectures. Every project is an opportunity to push boundaries and deliver something exceptional.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, you'll find me contributing to open-source projects, writing technical articles, or mentoring aspiring developers.

services.label: What I Do
services.title: Services & Expertise
services.fullstackDesc: End-to-end web applications built with modern frameworks, optimized for performance and scalability.
services.mobileDesc: Cross-platform mobile applications with React Native, delivering native performance on iOS and Android.
services.apiDesc: Robust, well-documented APIs designed for reliability, security, and developer experience.
services.uiuxDesc: Design audits and user experience consulting to improve conversion rates and user satisfaction.
services.performanceDesc: Speed audits and optimization — from bundle size reduction to database query tuning and caching strategies.
services.codeReviewDesc: Thorough code reviews and 1-on-1 mentoring to level up your team's engineering practices.
services.systemsDesc: Custom ERP, CRM, and internal tools that replace disconnected spreadsheets with one unified, role-based system built for your workflow.
services.saasDesc: End-to-end SaaS platforms with multi-tenancy, subscription billing, onboarding flows, and the architecture to scale from zero to thousands of users.
services.aiDesc: Practical AI integrations — smart search, content generation, data analysis, and workflow automation — built on top of your existing product.

projects.label: My Work
projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.electroerpDesc: Full-stack electrical supplies platform combining e-commerce with ERP — inventory, accounting, HR, and order management in one system. Live at himmat.store.
projects.printshopDesc: Custom print-on-demand platform with an interactive visual design builder, Paymob payment integration, and automated WhatsApp/SMS/email notifications.
projects.tajderaDesc: A gamified personal budget tracker that roasts your spending habits with AI-style sarcasm across 4 shame tiers. Fully offline, bilingual Arabic/English.
projects.sarmadaxDesc: A bilingual digital agency website built with Next.js, Framer Motion, and next-intl — featuring animated sections, a pricing page, portfolio, and contact form.
projects.electroerpChallenge: A traditional electrical supplies business was managing inventory, sales, accounting, HR, and orders across disconnected spreadsheets and phone calls — causing stock errors, billing delays, and lost revenue with no single source of truth.
projects.electroerpSolution: Built a unified full-stack ERP on Next.js and PostgreSQL that consolidates all business operations into one system with role-based access, real-time inventory tracking, double-entry accounting, and a customer-facing storefront — all live at himmat.store.
projects.electroerpFeature1: Role-based access for admin, warehouse, accountant, and sales staff
projects.electroerpFeature2: Real-time inventory with low-stock alerts and supplier management
projects.electroerpFeature3: Double-entry accounting with automated journal entries and reports
projects.electroerpFeature4: Customer portal with order tracking and invoice generation
projects.electroerpResult1: Replaced 3 disconnected tools with one unified system
projects.electroerpResult3: Live in production at himmat.store serving real customers
projects.printshopChallenge: A print-on-demand shop was losing customers because orders were placed by phone, design files emailed manually, and customers had zero visibility into their order status — creating friction at every step of the sales funnel.
projects.printshopSolution: Delivered a full e-commerce platform with an in-browser design builder where customers upload artwork, add text, and preview their product before purchasing. Integrated Paymob for card/wallet payments and automated WhatsApp, SMS, and email notifications at every order stage.
projects.printshopFeature1: In-browser design builder with live product preview
projects.printshopFeature2: Paymob gateway with card and mobile-wallet support
projects.printshopFeature3: Automated WhatsApp, SMS, and email order notifications
projects.printshopFeature4: Admin dashboard for order management and fulfillment
projects.printshopResult2: Zero manual notification effort — customer comms fully automated
projects.printshopResult3: Live at harfoushprint.com serving active customers
projects.tajderaChallenge: Most personal finance apps feel like homework — users open them once and abandon them. The challenge was building something that people genuinely want to return to, where tracking a budget feels rewarding instead of tedious.
projects.tajderaSolution: Built a gamified budget tracker that roasts spending habits with AI-style sarcasm across 4 escalating shame tiers. Fully offline-first with localStorage so no account is needed, with complete bilingual Arabic/English support and RTL layout throughout.
projects.tajderaFeature1: 4 escalating shame tiers with sarcastic AI-style commentary
projects.tajderaFeature2: 100% offline — all data in localStorage, zero backend needed
projects.tajderaFeature3: Full Arabic/English bilingual support with RTL layout
projects.tajderaFeature4: Framer Motion animated feedback on every interaction
projects.tajderaResult2: Zero privacy risk — data never leaves the device
projects.tajderaResult3: Bilingual coverage spanning Arabic and English markets
projects.sarmadaxChallenge: A growing digital agency needed a website that could simultaneously serve Arabic-speaking and English-speaking clients with equal quality — demanding perfect RTL layout, premium scroll animations, and a structure that converts visitors into leads.
projects.sarmadaxSolution: Built a fully bilingual Next.js site with next-intl for cookie-based locale switching, Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations, and a design system that passes all layout correctness checks in both LTR and RTL modes with no overrides or hacks.
projects.sarmadaxFeature1: Full Arabic/English bilingual support with correct RTL layout
projects.sarmadaxFeature2: Scroll-triggered Framer Motion animations across all sections
projects.sarmadaxFeature3: Pricing page, portfolio gallery, and animated contact form
projects.sarmadaxFeature4: Cookie-based locale switching with no URL prefix changes
projects.sarmadaxResult1: Professional online presence for the agency launched on time
projects.sarmadaxResult2: Zero RTL layout bugs across all sections and breakpoints
projects.sarmadaxResult3: High Lighthouse scores via Next.js App Router and lazy loading

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What Clients Say
testimonials.khalid: Ahmed delivered our SaaS platform in under 6 weeks — clean code, flawless Arabic RTL, and a design our clients immediately trusted. Best tech investment we've made.
testimonials.omar: We needed a complex logistics dashboard with real-time tracking and Arabic support. Ahmed nailed every requirement and went beyond what we asked for. Highly recommend.
testimonials.rania: Our e-commerce app launched to 30K+ downloads in the first three weeks. The interface feels premium, performance is excellent, and the team was responsive at every step.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Send me a message and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
